task: Write a Python function that parses an AWS S3 bucket URI (e.g., 's3://my-bucket/path/to/file.txt') and returns a dictionary with keys 'bucket' and 'key'.
Create a JSON object that represents an AWS IAM policy allowing read-only access to all objects in an S3 bucket named 'data-bucket'.
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS EC2 instance IDs (format: i-followed by 8 or 17 hexadecimal characters, e.g., 'i-0abcd1234efgh5678').
